description: End-to-end replay of pr-reviewer's read-only review agent plus deterministic github_comment output step. Forwards a github.pull_request webhook payload (opened, kota/task/* head branch, non-fork) through `kota workflow exec --payload`, replays the review agent from a synthesized recording, uses a fixture-local GitHub module to avoid host credentials and network access, and asserts the prepared comment, tool write, and workflow.pr.review.posted emission.

triggerPayload.title: Add cache-warming task to inbox-sorter
triggerPayload.actorIntegrityReason: author association 'MEMBER' satisfies the configured trust threshold

provenance.justification: pr-reviewer has zero real-failure runs to encode (the workflow only fires on github.pull_request webhooks and KOTA's own dogfood loop has not produced one yet), so this fixture is the harness-plumbing gate for the deterministic safe-output boundary: the review agent returns structured JSON, prepare-comment validates and bounds one body, guardrails policy decides whether the approval step is required, github_comment performs the only external write, and workflow.pr.review.posted is emitted only after that write path succeeds. The fixture uses a project-local github_comment recorder plus a guardrails allow override so subprocess replay can exercise the post path without host GitHub credentials, network access, or a hanging operator approval.
